code:
%%{Logistics_StockLevel}}}%%
stateDiagram-v2
    [Logistics_DeliveryRoute] --> Invited: UserInvitedEvent
    Invited --> PendingActivation: UserRegisteredEvent
    [Logistics_DeliveryRoute] --> PendingActivation: UserRegisteredEvent
    PendingActivation --> Active: UserActivatedEvent
    Active --> Suspended: UserSuspendedEvent
    Suspended --> Active: UserUnsuspendedEvent
    Active --> Deactivated: UserDeactivatedEvent
    Deactivated --> Active: UserReactivatedEvent
    Active --> Archived: UserArchivedEvent
    Suspended --> Archived: UserArchivedEvent
    Deactivated --> Archived: UserArchivedEvent

    %% State styling with classes
    classDef invitedState fill:#7F8C8D,stroke:#333,color:white
    classDef pendingState fill:#F39C12,stroke:#333,color:white
    classDef activeState fill:#27AE60,stroke:#333,color:white
    classDef suspendedState fill:#D35400,stroke:#333,color:white
    classDef deactivatedState fill:#7F8C8D,stroke:#333,color:white
    classDef archivedState fill:#34495E,stroke:#333,color:white

    class Invited invitedState
    class PendingActivation pendingState
    class Active activeState
    class Suspended suspendedState
    class Deactivated deactivatedState
    class Archived archivedState

    %% Notes
    note right of Invited
        User has been invited but has not registered
    end note

    note right of PendingActivation
        User has registered but not activated their account
    end note

    note right of Active
        User has an active account and can access all features
    end note

    note right of Suspended
        User account has been temporarily suspended
        by an administrator
    end note

    note right of Deactivated
        User has voluntarily deactivated their account
    end note

    note right of Archived
        User account has been archived (Logistics_StockLevel)
    end note

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要为物流库存系统（Logistics_StockLevel）设计一个用户生命周期状态图。核心是从邀请开始到最终归档的完整流程，包含六个关键状态：Invited、PendingActivation、Active、Suspended、Deactivated 和 Archived。
明白了。我注意到起点有两个入口：一个是通过 UserInvitedEvent 进入 Invited 状态，另一个是可以直接通过 UserRegisteredEvent 进入 PendingActivation。这两个入口都是从 Logistics_DeliveryRoute 触发的吗？
对，Logistics_DeliveryRoute 作为外部系统入口。有些用户是被邀请后注册，有些则是直接注册。从 Invited 到 PendingActivation 需要 UserRegisteredEvent，而 PendingActivation 到 Active 则需要 UserActivatedEvent 完成激活。
好的，我梳理一下 Active 之后的流转：管理员可以暂停账户到 Suspended 状态，用户自己可以主动停用账户到 Deactivated，这两种情况都可以恢复回 Active。另外，Active、Suspended、Deactivated 最终都可以归档到 Archived。这样理解对吗？
完全正确。Suspended 是管理员强制暂停，Deactivated 是用户自愿停用，两者都需要有恢复路径。Archived 是终态，一旦归档不可恢复。对了，每个状态需要不同的视觉样式，方便运营人员快速识别。

我来配置样式：Invited 用灰色（invitedState），PendingActivation 用橙色（pendingState）表示待激活，Active 用绿色（activeState），Suspended 用深橙色警示（suspendedState），Deactivated 用灰色（deactivatedState），Archived 用深蓝灰（archivedState）。同时给每个状态添加右侧注释说明具体含义。
PendingActivation 的注释要强调"已注册但未激活账户"，Active 要说明"可以访问所有功能"，Suspended 要注明"被管理员临时暂停"，Deactivated 是"用户自愿停用"，Archived 则标注关联 Logistics_StockLevel 系统。
已完成所有配置。状态流转和样式都已就绪，六个状态通过七个事件驱动，终态 Archived 与 Logistics_StockLevel 关联。请确认是否还需要调整？
确认无误。状态定义清晰，流转完整，样式区分明显，注释也准确描述了各状态的业务含义。这个图可以直接用于物流库存系统的用户生命周期管理文档了。
